command.description: Toggle mute for all non-admin players
command.grant_description: Grant temporary access to the voice command to a player
message.players_muted: All {0} non-admin players have been muted.
message.players_muted_timer: All {0} non-admin players have been muted for {1} seconds.
message.auto_unmuted: All players have been automatically unmuted after {0} seconds.
message.global_mute: All player microphones have been muted.
message.global_unmute: All player microphones have been unmuted!
message.threshold_mute_enabled: Voice muted: the server exceeded {0} players. Only admins can speak.
message.threshold_mute_disabled: Voice restored: the player count dropped below {0} and all players have been unmuted.
message.voice_mute_started: An admin is speaking. All players have been muted.
message.voice_mute_ended: The admin stopped speaking. All players have been unmuted.
message.permission_granted: Temporary voice command access granted to {0} until the next map change.
message.permission_granted_target: You have been granted temporary access to voice commands until the map changes.
message.permission_revoked: Temporary voice command access revoked from {0}.
message.permission_revoked_target: Your temporary access to voice commands has been revoked.
message.permission_expired: Your temporary access to voice commands has expired due to the map change.
error.no_permission: You do not have permission to use this command. Required: {0}
error.players_only: This command can only be used by players.
error.missing_argument: You must specify a team filter: @ct, @t or @all
error.grant_missing_target: You must specify a player name, userid (#id) or slot number.
error.target_is_bot: You cannot grant permissions to bots.
